---
title: 'Demo: EMG preprocessing (orbicularis oculi)'
author: "Lucien Bickerstaff"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r render-time-1, include=FALSE}
# Record how long it took to render the file
.render_start <- Sys.time()
```

```{r setup, warning=F, message=F}
library(here)
library(patchwork)

id <- "309"
muscle <- "ooc" # orbicularis oculi

emg_data <- readRDS(here("data", "preprocessing_demos", "demo_pilot_emg_data.rds"))

source(here("R", "helpers.R"))
source(here("R", "emg_preprocessing.R"))
```

```{r preprocessing}
# run preprocessing
emg_data_pp <- preprocess_emg(
  data = emg_data,
  pid = id,
  muscle = muscle
)
```

Now we can visualise what the data looks like aftr each preprocessing step

```{r plotting}
plot_raw <- plot_emg(
  emg_data_pp,
  which = "raw"
)
plot_centered <- plot_emg(
  emg_data_pp,
  which = "zero_centered"
)
plot_rectified <- plot_emg(
  emg_data_pp,
  which = "rectified"
)
plot_smoothed <- plot_emg(
  emg_data_pp,
  which = "smoothed"
)
plot_bc <- plot_emg(
  emg_data_pp,
  which = "baseline_corrected"
)

# Combine plots into big figure
full_plot <- wrap_plots(list(
      plot_raw,
      plot_centered,
      plot_rectified,
      plot_smoothed,
      plot_bc
    ), ncol = 1) +
      plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
      plot_annotation(title = glue("EMG data preprocessing, {muscles[emg_data_pp$channel]}, participant {id}")) &
      theme(
        plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 9, family = "Arial"),
        legend.position = "right"
      )
full_plot

# save plots
formatted_save(here("outputs", "figures", "preprocessing_emg.jpg"), full_plot, width = 7, height = 9)
save_rds_safe(full_plot, here("outputs", "figures", "rds", "preprocessing_emg.rds"))
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```

```{r render-time-2, echo=FALSE}
render_time <- Sys.time() - .render_start
cat("Render time:", format(render_time))
```
